item.title: The Famous '67 Hemi Coronet Story
item.description: Discover the story behind the 1967 Hemi Coronet, a well-known muscle car with a unique place in automotive history. What makes it so memorable today?

media:content.media:title: The Famous '67 Hemi Coronet Story
media:content.media:description: Discover the story behind the 1967 Hemi Coronet, a well-known muscle car with a unique place in automotive history. What makes it so memorable today?

item.title: 1955 Ford Bubbletop Still Runs Smoothly
item.description: A 1955 Ford Bubbletop continues to run smoothly, showcasing its lasting performance and classic appeal. What keeps vintage cars like this going strong?

media:content.media:description: A 1955 Ford Bubbletop continues to run smoothly, showcasing its lasting performance and classic appeal. What keeps vintage cars like this going strong?

item.title: 1960s Plymouth Savoy with a Custom Build
item.description: Explore a 1960s Plymouth Savoy featuring a bold custom build and standout design choices. What makes this classic car build unique?

item.title: 1971 Ford Boss Mustang Spotlight
item.description: A look at the 1971 Ford Mustang Boss 351, known for its performance and bold design. A true classic of the muscle car era. What makes it iconic?

item.title: Original 1970 Superbird Spotlight
item.description: A close look at the 1970 Plymouth Superbird in original condition, focusing on its rare design and performance heritage. How rare is this configuration?

item.title: 1970 El Camino in Remarkable Condition
item.description: A well-preserved 1970 Chevrolet El Camino is showcased, highlighting its condition, utility design, and classic styling. What makes this model so unique?

item.title: Evel Knievel’s Iconic Machines
item.description: A look at vehicles linked to Evel Knievel, including the F1 dragster and Canyon Rocket, highlighting their design and role in stunt history. What stands out most?

item.title: 2015 Morgan 3 Wheeler Spotlight
item.description: A look at the Morgan 3 Wheeler, exploring its design, driving feel, and unique styling. A modern take on a classic concept. What makes it so different from typical cars?

item.title: Proud Dad Shows Off a 1964 Buick Riviera

item.title: One of Just Five: 1969 Cadillac
item.description: One of only a handful built, this 1969 Cadillac stands out for its rarity and design. How does rarity affect value?
